seoTitle: Swanbank vs Swans Lagoon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Swanbank and Swans Lagoon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Swanbank vs Swans Lagoon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swanbank and Swans Lagoon.
heading: Swanbank vs Swans Lagoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swanbank, Queensland and Swans Lagoon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swans Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Swanbank (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swanbank or Swans Lagoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swanbank has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Swans Lagoon scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swanbank scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Swans Lagoon scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swanbank or Swans Lagoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swans Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.57% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
